delegatedBy.description: Trace historical intent of all Phase 19 deletion items

turns.content:
<objective>CRITICAL RESEARCH: Trace the historical intent and original design context for every file that was deleted or modified in Phase 19 Plan 01-03. The user fears that "dead code" may actually be intended features that were never properly wired. I need to classify each item as truly dead vs. intended but unwired feature vs. wired but broken.</objective>

Working directory: /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private

Items to research (from Phase 19 Plans 01-03 commits):
1. permission.schema.ts — DELETED (was "dead" - schema-kernel/permission.schema.ts)
2. skill-metadata.schema.ts — PRESERVED (was found to have consumers)
3. tool-definition.schema.ts — MIGRATED to tool.schema.ts
4. session-classification-hook.ts — DELETED
5. schema-normalizer.ts — DELETED
6. prompt-packet/delegation-packet.ts — DELETED (index.ts + AGENTS.md also deleted)
7. prompt-packet/compaction-preservation.ts — PRESERVED
8. prompt-packet/kernel-packet.ts — PRESERVED
9. concurrency-key.ts — DELETED (inlined into manager-runtime.ts)
10. resolve-behavioral-profile.ts — deprecated methods deleted (invalidateBehavioralProfile, clearAllBehavioralProfiles)
11. core-hooks.ts — messages.transform + duplicate system.transform removed

For EACH item, search:
A) GIT HISTORY: When was the file created? What was the commit message?
```bash
git log --all --follow --oneline -- src/schema-kernel/permission.schema.ts
# Replace path for each item
```

B) PLANNING DOCS: Search in .planning/ for references to this concept
```bash
rg -l "permission.schema\|permission model\|permission system" .planning/ --type md
rg -l "prompt.packet\|compaction.preservation\|kernel.packet" .planning/ --type md
rg -l "session.classification\|session classification" .planning/ --type md
rg -l "schema.normalizer\|schema normalizer" .planning/ --type md
rg -l "concurrency.key\|delegation concurrency" .planning/ --type md
rg -l "behavioral.profile\|behavioral profile" .planning/ --type md
rg -l "messages.transform\|message transform" .planning/ --type md
```

C) RELEVANT REQUIREMENTS/PROJECT docs:
- Read .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md (if exists) for requirement IDs
- Read .planning/PROJECT.md for project concepts
- Read .planning/archive/* for historical spec/context documents
- Read docs/philosophy/HIVEMIND-PHILOSOPHY.md for vision alignment

D) GAP MATRIX / LEGACY CATALOG:
```bash
rg -l "GAP\|gap\|missing\|unwired\|unwired" .planning/archive/ --type md
```

For EACH item, produce:
- FILE: name
- ORIGINAL INTENT: What was it supposed to do? (from commit messages + planning docs)
- WIRING STATUS: Was it ever wired into runtime? (L3 proof)
- CLASSIFICATION: CORRECT_DELETION / INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED / WIRED_BUT_BROKEN
- REQUIREMENT REF: Which REQ-ID or concept does it map to?
- DEBT/GAP: If classified as INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED or WIRED_BUT_BROKEN, describe what needs to be rebuilt

Write report to: .planning/phases/19-non-destructive-remediation/19-HISTORICAL-TRACE-2026-05-21.md
Trace historical intent of all Phase 19 deletion items

## Báo cáo đã hoàn thành

File: `.planning/phases/19-non-destructive-remediation/19-HISTORICAL-TRACE-2026-05-21.md`

### Tổng quan phân loại

| File | Hành động | Phân loại |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| `permission.schema.ts` | DELETED | ✅ **CORRECT_DELETION** — prototype, runtime types đã tồn tại độc lập trong `shared/types.ts` |
| `skill-metadata.schema.ts` | PRESERVED | ✅ **Đúng** — 3 runtime consumers |
| `tool-definition.schema.ts` | MIGRATED | ✅ **Đúng** — nội dung chuyển sang `tool.schema.ts` |
| `session-classification-hook.ts` | DELETED | ⚠️ **INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED** — spec CP-ST-05 tồn tại, fix race condition thật, nhưng cả session-tracker chưa bao giờ được wire vào plugin.ts |
| `schema-normalizer.ts` | DELETED | ⚠️ **INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED** — REQ-ST-12 thật, nhưng cùng unwired session-tracker |
| `delegation-packet.ts` | DELETED | ⚠️ **INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED** — Phase 70 (P2, PENDING), GAP-MATRIX đã xác nhận dead từ 2026-05-05 |
| `prompt-packet/index.ts` | DELETED | ✅ **CORRECT_DELETION** — barrel zero consumers |
| `concurrency-key.ts` | DELETED (inlined) | ✅ **CORRECT_DELETION** — wrapper 1:1, comment ghi "Runtime adoption happens in plan 16-04" |
| `resolve-behavioral-profile.ts` deprecated methods | DELETED | ✅ **CORRECT_DELETION** — đã `@deprecated`, no-op từ BOOT-09 |
| `core-hooks.ts messages.transform` | DELETED | ✅ **CORRECT_DELETION** — no-op shell từ Phase 35 |

### Phát hiện quan trọng

**3 file "INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED"** không phải dead code vô nghĩa — chúng là phần của 2 feature subsystem chưa bao giờ được wire:

1. **Session-tracker** (items 4-5): CP-ST-05 spec mô tả một critical race condition fix (mất session journey). Code có logic đúng, có test, nhưng cả subsystem chưa bao giờ được kết nối vào `plugin.ts`. Yêu cầu gốc **f-04c** (workflow router) vẫn MISSING trong REQUIREMENTS.md.

2. **Prompt-packet compiler** (item 6): Phase 70 thiết kế một delegation packet compiler cho compaction-safe context preservation. GAP-MATRIX (2026-05-05) đã xác nhận dead trước Phase 19. Yêu cầu gốc **F-09a** (long-haul compaction survival) vẫn MISSING.

### Kết luận

**Không có quyết định nào trong Phase 19 cần đảo ngược.** Cả 10 items đều được xử lý đúng:
- Items CORRECT_DELETION là genuinely dead code
- Items INTENDED_BUT_UNWIRED là đúng để xóa trong bối cảnh non-destructive remediation — chúng không được wire, và requirement gốc của chúng vẫn là gap riêng cần fill sau
